Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Interface AuxiliaryContract

All Superinterfaces:
SpecificationElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
BlockContract, LoopContract
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl, BlockContractImpl, LoopContractImpl
public interface AuxiliaryContract extends SpecificationElement
Super-interface for BlockContract and LoopContract.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static class 
    AuxiliaryContract.Terms
     
    static class 
    AuxiliaryContract.Variables
    This class contains all new variables that are introduced during a AuxiliaryContract's instantiation.
    static class 
    AuxiliaryContract.VariablesCreator

    hasFreeModifiesClause(LocationVariable heap)
    Returns true iff the method (according to the free part of the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."

    Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.SpecificationElement

    getDisplayName, getKJT, getName, getVisibility

  • Method Details

    • getFunctionalContracts

      ImmutableSet<FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<?>> getFunctionalContracts()
      Returns:
      all FunctionalAuxiliaryContracts with a valid id that correspond to this BlockSpecificationElement. Unless this contract is a combination of other contracts, the resulting set will only contain one element.

    • setFunctionalContract

      void setFunctionalContract(FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<?> contract)
      Parameters:
      contract - the new functional contract.
      See Also:
      • getFunctionalContracts()

    • getBlock

      StatementBlock getBlock()
      Returns:
      the block this contract belongs to.

    • getLabels

      List<Label> getLabels()
      Returns:
      all labels belonging to getBlock()

    • getMethod

      IProgramMethod getMethod()
      Returns:
      the method containing getBlock()

    • getModality

      Modality getModality()
      Returns:
      this contract's modality.

    • getPlaceholderVariables

      AuxiliaryContract.Variables getPlaceholderVariables()
      Returns the set of placeholder variables created during this contract's instantiation. These are replaced by the real variables with the same names when the contract is applied.
      Returns:
      the placeholder variables used created during this contracts instantiation.
      See Also:
      • AuxiliaryContractBuilders.VariablesCreatorAndRegistrar

    • isTransactionApplicable

      boolean isTransactionApplicable()
      Returns:
      true if and only if this contract is applicable for transactions.

    • isReadOnly

      boolean isReadOnly(Services services)
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      Returns:
      true if and only if this contract is read-only.

    • getBaseName

      String getBaseName()
      Returns:
      this contract's base name.

    • getUniqueName

      String getUniqueName()
      Returns:
      this contract's unique name.

    • hasModifiesClause

      boolean hasModifiesClause(LocationVariable heap)
      Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      Returns:
      whether this contract is strictly pure.

    • hasFreeModifiesClause

      boolean hasFreeModifiesClause(LocationVariable heap)
      Returns true iff the method (according to the free part of the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      Returns:
      whether this contract is strictly pure.

    • getInstantiationSelfTerm

      Term getInstantiationSelfTerm()
      Returns:
      the self variable as a term.

    • getPrecondition

      Term getPrecondition(LocationVariable heap, Services services)
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

    • getPrecondition

      Term getPrecondition(LocationVariable heap, AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, Services services)
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      variables - the variables to use instead of getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap with all free program variables replaced by those in variables.

    • getPrecondition

      Term getPrecondition(LocationVariable heap, ProgramVariable self, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> atPres, Services services)
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      self - the self variable to use instead of getPlaceholderVariables().
      atPres - a map from every variable var to \old(var) to use instead of getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

    • getPrecondition

      Term getPrecondition(LocationVariable heapVariable, Term heap, Term self, Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres, Services services)
      Parameters:
      heapVariable - the heap to use.
      heap - the heap to use.
      self - the self variable to use to use instead of getPlaceholderVariables().
      atPres - a map from every variable var to \old(var) to use instead of getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

    • getPrecondition

      Term getPrecondition(LocationVariable heapVariable, Term heap, AuxiliaryContract.Terms terms, Services services)
      Parameters:
      heapVariable - the heap to use.
      heap - the heap to use.
      terms - the terms to use instead of getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

    • getPostcondition

      Term getPostcondition(LocationVariable heap, AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, Services services)
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      variables - the variables to use instead of getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's postcondition on the specified heap.

      Term getPostcondition(LocationVariable heapVariable, Term heap, AuxiliaryContract.Terms terms, Services services)
      Parameters:
      heapVariable - the heap to use.
      heap - the heap to use.
      terms - the terms to use instead of getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

      Term getPostcondition(LocationVariable heap, Services services)
      Parameters:

      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

      Parameters:

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      this contract's free postcondition on the specified heap.

      Term getAssignable(LocationVariable heap)

    • visit

      void visit(Visitor visitor)
      Accepts a visitor.
      Parameters:
      visitor - the visitor to accept.

    • getHtmlText

      String getHtmlText(Services services)
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      Returns:
      a HTML representation of this contract.

    • getPlainText

      String getPlainText(Services services)
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      Returns:
      a plain text representation of this contract.

    • getPlainText

      String getPlainText(Services services, AuxiliaryContract.Terms terms)
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      terms - the terms to use instead of getPlaceholderVariables().
      Returns:
      a plain text representation of this contract.

    • getTarget

      IProgramMethod getTarget()
      Returns:
      the method in which the block is located.

    • hasMby

      boolean hasMby()
      Returns:
      true if and only if this contract has a measured-by clause.
      See Also:
      • getMby()

    • getMby

      Term getMby()
      Returns:
      this contract's measured-by clause if it has one, null otherwise.

    • getMby

      Term getMby(AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, Services services)
      Parameters:
      variables - variables to use instead of getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's measured-by clause if it has one, null otherwise.

    • getMby

      Term getMby(ProgramVariable selfVar, Services services)
      Parameters:
      selfVar - the self variable to use instead of getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's measured-by clause if it has one, null otherwise.

    • getMby

      Term getMby(Map<LocationVariable,Term> heapTerms, Term selfTerm, Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres, Services services)
      Parameters:
      heapTerms - the heaps to use.
      selfTerm - the self variable to use instead of getPlaceholderVariables().
      atPres - a map from every variable var to \old(var) to use instead of getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's measured-by clause if it has one, null otherwise.

    • hasInfFlowSpecs

      boolean hasInfFlowSpecs()
      Returns:
      true if and only if this contract has information flow specs.
      See Also:
      • getInfFlowSpecs()

    • setInstantiationSelf

      void setInstantiationSelf(Term selfInstantiation)
      Parameters:
      selfInstantiation - the new instantiation self term.
      See Also:
      • getInstantiationSelfTerm()

    • getInstantiationSelfTerm

      Term getInstantiationSelfTerm(TermServices services)
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      Returns:
      the term internally used for self or a newly instantiated one. Use with care - it is likely that this is *not* the right "self" for you.

    • getPre

      Term getPre(Services services)
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      Returns:
      the original precondition of the contract.

    • getPost

      Term getPost(Services services)
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      Returns:
      the original postcondition of the contract.

    • getFreePre

      Term getFreePre(Services services)
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      Returns:
      the original free precondition of the contract.

    • getFreePost

      Term getFreePost(Services services)
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      Returns:
      the original free postcondition of the contract.

    • getMod

      Term getMod(Services services)
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      Returns:
      the original modifies clause of the contract.

    • getInfFlowSpecs

      ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> getInfFlowSpecs()
      Returns:
      the original information flow specification clause of the contract.

    • getVariables

      AuxiliaryContract.Variables getVariables()
      Returns:
      the original used variables like self, result etc..

    • setTarget

      AuxiliaryContract setTarget(KeYJavaType newKJT, IObserverFunction newPM)
      Parameters:
      newKJT - the type containing the new target method.
      newPM - the new target method.
      Returns:
      a contract equal to this one except that it belongs to a different target.

    • setBlock

      AuxiliaryContract setBlock(StatementBlock newBlock)
      Parameters:
      newBlock - the new block.
      Returns:
      a contract equal to this one except that it belongs to a different block.

    • getVariablesAsTerms

      AuxiliaryContract.Terms getVariablesAsTerms(Services services)
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      Returns:
      the original used variables like self, result etc. as terms.

    • getOrigVars

      Contract.OriginalVariables getOrigVars()
      Returns:
      the contract's variabels converted to OriginalVariables.
      See Also:
      • getVariables()

    • map

      AuxiliaryContract map(UnaryOperator<Term> op, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      Specified by:
      map in interface SpecificationElement
      Parameters:
      op - the operator to apply.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this specification element with the operator applied.
